violations.explanation: Inline page.locator() wrapping a POM elements reference. The mapping report shows that print_history_page_additions.py defines billing_cycle_period_card as a locator. After merging, this should be accessed directly as print_history_page.billing_cycle_period_card (a Locator property), not wrapped in page.locator(). The pattern page.locator(page_obj.elements.X) is only valid when X is a STRING selector stored in Elements class. However, after merge, billing_cycle_period_card will be a Locator property in __init__, so it should be accessed directly without page.locator() wrapper.

Missing .elements. namespace when accessing POM locator. The page_additions file defines plan_pause_info in the Elements class as a string selector. The correct access pattern per the framework is print_history_page.elements.plan_pause_info when the locator is stored in Elements class. The current code accesses it as a direct property (print_history_page.plan_pause_info), which would only be correct if it were defined as self.plan_pause_info = page.locator(...) in __init__. Since the page_additions shows it in Elements class, the .elements. namespace is required.
Same issue as V002 - missing .elements. namespace for plan_pause_info locator access in Step 5.
Missing .elements. namespace for complimentary_pages_progress_bar. This locator is defined in Elements class in page_additions, so must be accessed via .elements. namespace.
Missing .elements. namespace for complimentary_pages_info_icon when performing click action. All locators in Elements class require .elements. namespace.
Missing .elements. namespace for complimentary_pages_info_icon when performing hover action.
Missing .elements. namespace for complimentary_pages_tooltip locator access.
Missing .elements. namespace for complimentary_pages_tooltip in second assertion.
Missing .elements. namespace when reading text content from tooltip.
Missing .elements. namespace for complimentary_pages_value locator. This pattern repeats multiple times in the script for various locators.

The current code only captures a screenshot but does not perform any visual comparison assertion. The test case analysis indicates this step requires visual regression testing with baseline comparison. A screenshot alone without comparison is insufficient - there must be an assertion that compares the captured screenshot against a baseline image to verify visual correctness.

The test script should not contain raw Rails Admin interaction logic.

fix_priority_order.fix_approach: Add .elements. namespace to all locator accesses that reference Elements class properties. The page_additions file defines all new locators in an Elements inner class. When accessing these locators from the test script, the pattern must be page.locator(print_history_page.elements.{locator_name}), not print_history_page.{locator_name}. The latter pattern is only valid for locators defined as direct properties in __init__ (self.locator = page.locator(...)). Since all new locators are in Elements class, they require .elements. namespace. Replace all instances of print_history_page.{locator} with page.locator(print_history_page.elements.{locator}) for: plan_pause_info, complimentary_pages_progress_bar, complimentary_pages_info_icon, complimentary_pages_tooltip, complimentary_pages_value, complimentary_pages_info_message, additional_pages_progress_bar, additional_pages_value, additional_pages_info_icon, additional_pages_info_message, additional_pages_tooltip.
Remove all TODO and implementation note comments. Production code should not contain placeholder comments. Either implement the functionality or remove the comment.
Make log messages more concise following the pattern 'Step N completed: brief description'. Reduce verbosity while maintaining clarity.

Add visual comparison assertion in Step 20. The current code only captures a screenshot but does not compare it against a baseline. Implement visual regression testing using a visual comparison tool or library.
Encapsulate Rails Admin pause subscription logic into a single helper method GeminiRAHelper.pause_subscription(page, tenant_email). Remove inline Rails Admin navigation from test script.
Uncomment the enrollment success verification assertion and add the required ConfirmationPage import and instantiation.

Remove page.locator() wrapper around print_history_page.elements.billing_cycle_period_card in Step 20. After merge, billing_cycle_period_card will be a Locator property, so it should be accessed directly.
Use correct access pattern for additional_pages_progress_bar: page.locator(print_history_page.elements.additional_pages_progress_bar) instead of direct property access.
